@Z	e
This module has a number of tests that raise different kinds of warnings.
When the tests are run, the warnings are caught and their messages are printed
to stdout.  This module also accepts an arg that is then passed to
unittest.main to affect the behavior of warnings.
Test_TextTestRunner.test_warnings executes this script with different
combinations of warnings args and -W flags and check that the output is correct.
See #10535.
warnings
warn
RuntimeWarning
4/usr/lib64/python3.9/unittest/test/_test_warnings.py
warnfun
TestWarningsc
assertEquals
selfr
test_assert
TestWarnings.test_assertc
failUnlessr
	test_fail
TestWarnings.test_failc
assertAlmostEqualZ
assertNotAlmostEqualr
test_other_unittest 
z TestWarnings.test_other_unittestc
DeprecationWarningr
test_deprecation%
TestWarnings.test_deprecationc
ImportWarningr
test_import*
TestWarnings.test_importc
test_warning0
TestWarnings.test_warningc
test_function7
TestWarnings.test_functionN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__r
__main__T)
recordr
exitr
__doc__
sysZ
unittestr
TestCaser
catch_warningsZ
argv
main
